name: Cameco Corporation
description: Cameco Corporation is one of the world’s largest global providers of the uranium fuel needed to energize a clean-air world. Based in Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, the company is a significant producer of uranium and provides refining, conversion, and fuel manufacturing services. Cameco’s competitive position is based on its ownership of the world’s largest high-grade reserves and low-cost operations. Its products are used to generate clean, carbon-free electricity in nuclear power plants around the globe, supporting the transition to a low-carbon economy through reliable and sustainable energy solutions.
